transcript.text: Hello.
Hi, how are you?
Nice to meet you.
My name is Paul.
Hi, Paul.
Carrie.
Vivek wasn't available, so I'm going to be flying solo, so hopefully you guys will have a little patience with me.
Yeah, no worries.
No worries.
Thank you.
Thank you.
Thank you.
Thank
Thank you.
Just checking in if, yeah, Victor's here, yep.
I don't know if Theo's going to jump in.
Let me double-check with him.
He didn't respond to the meeting invite that I know.
I know Victor was coming, so.
I have a question.
Is this going to be like a normal, regular time, or?
No, I guess Victor wanted to reschedule, and he and I were both free at this time.
okay, okay.
We moved to Tuesdays at 9.30 Pacific.
Yeah, that makes sense.
next week, yeah.
Okay, I just want to double-check.
We should have open office hours during this time, so I can jump off early.
Hi, can you hear me, guys?
Yeah.
Okay, cool.
Yeah, Paul, I was just going to touch base quickly with Carrie, so no worries if you want to jump or if you want to stay.
Either way, it works.
No.
Okay, yeah, I already told him that I had a meeting, and I assume it's going to be one time.
So, I don't know, do you need me for anything, though, or is there any specific things that I would be required for?
Well, I think the goal here is to first get to meet you, Carrie, and then getting a quick update on some of the things we...
Actually, Vivek responded in the thread about updates on integration pages, comparison...
So, for me, it's more like trying to make sure I have a bit more visibility into where we are, because it wasn't clear, at least until we responded.
So, that's what I wanted to cover today in particular.
So, yeah, Paul, I think feel free to stay if you already told them that you're not going to join the Office Hours.
Yeah, yeah, I'll stay just so I do the same thing.
I was there for half an hour, and I already told them that this is a one-off meeting, so it's fine.
Okay, cool.
Perfect.
Awesome.
Did you have any questions?
I'm meeting with Vivek several times this week and next as part of the transition.
So, if there's anything else, too, that he didn't get to.
It looks like he covered everything that you asked about, but I just wanted to make sure that you were good there.
Yeah.
So, like, where I am lacking visibility is on the ones...
lists that are missing and where we're tracking that.
Is everything in Airtable?
Yeah, it should be.
Okay.

So then I think I need to dive a bit deeper on the different tabs in Airtable to see what the status is on the GrowthX side, but I also want to know like from SEO side, like where we are in terms of like the volume that's left to publish in terms of what's in our queue.
I don't have too much visibility on that either.
Yeah.

When you get into Airtable, if there's something that you don't see that you would like to see, just let me know and I can update that for you too, so that you have visibility into whatever you want to be able to see.
That's easy for us to do.
I did get from Vivek, I can share the agenda here.
I did get from Vivek that
Like, just normal overview, like what we would normally talk about in a meeting, but that he said content is on track for this week.
He's also, I think, moving some topics around.
And he said he sent over a list of new topics that just need review.
And I believe they are for some gaps for LLMs.
And I believe that is in Airtable.
Yeah, it's coming to your interface.
Yeah, I think we have already reviewed this.
And we only, like, didn't go for one.
So, except this is a new one.
But I would definitely, like, send you the chat thread so you take a look at it.
But the last one he shared with us, we have reviewed it.
And, yeah, they look good to us, except for one.
Okay, okay, good to know.
Most of this, I think, Vivek said was already in progress.
There's a couple things.
things.
There's
that we're waiting on, NOTAM 4, and this particular, the updating the comparison page list with the CM entry, it should be done by Friday, so we're on track there, too.

Okay, so on this one, like, I think, like, the first action item is done, that was shipped, so now we don't see, we used to have a big table, that was removed from all the pages, that's why I'm kind of keen to see what are the missing ones on the comparison pages, because right now, it's showing, like, basically a blank page, so that's what, so I guess, like, from your side, Theo, like, you've received, I think Vivek said in the thread, something like 30 comparison pages so far, and do you confirm all of these have been published online?
Yeah, so, the comparison...
Using Pages, we have, like, published some entries, and right now, what I'm waiting for is for the next batch of entries and then the task of creating the entries for the CM collection type.
Okay.
All right.
So that's the one that you just...
Okay, so Vivek said he's on top of this one, and the next batch will be delivered this week as planned.
Okay.
Okay.
Okay.
So that's comparison pages.
think then we're good.
Feel free to check the first one.
Oh, actually, you did.
Perfect.
So you marked it as well.
Great.
And then the...
On the integration side, Theo, do you...
What's on in your queue?
Like, did you also get a chance to publish everything that grows to XSM so far?
Yeah, the last one they sent was a batch, which was blog posts and integration pages, which I have published.
So for this week, I would definitely check and see if there are new ones so I could publish them.
Because we have just a few drafts from the blog post.
And the only thing that has been the blogger was finding the right images, which you have confirmed with me.
So definitely, I will publish them.
And if there are new integration pages, I will do that as well.
That sounds good.
When I was reviewing the integration pages, I think it's starting to look really good.
Because now the related integration pages has been shipped.
This is like from Notoom, know, like it's the cross-linking between the integration pages.
That has been addressed this week.
So that's...
That looks a lot better.
I think GrowthX has done the FAQ component as well, which looks really good.
The last issue is the form component.
We used to have a form component.
That is still looking...
In some cases, I think the form is there.
In some cases, I think we still have the component, but the forms are not there.
So this is something that we need to address.
And my understanding is that we were...
Instead of having a dedicated form for each of the pages, we were just going to have a subscribe to the newsletter form.
So it should be consistent across all the integration page and just link to the newsletter.
So making sure this is something that is clear for you as well.
newsletter for that But
So Theo is going to keep track of that, then it's on your NOTAM, that's going to go to NOTAM, right?
No, in this case, this is not a NOTAM fix, it's a content management fix.
Okay, gotcha.
So that's why it kind of falls on you and Theo, like when creating...
I'm not entirely sure, like, so for new integration pages, you create the new entry in the CMS, so you should be able to make sure that component is linking to the right form.
So Theo, are you able to maybe, like, find one that renders correctly with the newsletter form and the right description?
And then just, from there, like, just make sure, like, the information is provided to GrowthX, so that for any net new integration page, like...
This is, you know, they can see that component with the right form ID.
And so, you know, we have the right, we have the right component across the board.
Yeah, sure.
I could do that for the new entries.
Yeah.
And then, so that means, like, we have to also kind of go back and think that for the other ones, right?

Because, like, I can share, I'm not on my desk, but, like, if you look at a bunch of different integrations, pages, you'll see that component, like, sometimes there's, like, a blog, but the form is not showing and so it doesn't look good.
Okay.
Okay.
I will, I will pass that on, where, I haven't, I, I know what you are saying.
I haven't seen it myself, because I haven't been into your CMS yet, but I will, I will have that.
And I could, I could also, like, share some screenshots when I, to give you better context.
Yeah, that would be great.
Perfect.
Okay, cool.
So I think that's it for integration.

And so for me, then the next topic is on the net new blog post, just making sure like we, for the Ride the Wave content that I flagged last week, on like the CMS, kind of following what Vercel did with like the next JSBucks practices.
We want to have the CMS edition of that.

So this is a bit new, like I think for, I don't think necessarily like GrowthX has all the context to provide like 100% of an article on that topic because I think it requires a bit of like strappy knowledge.
So, Paul, how do you want to work with the GrowthX teams on this one?
The idea is GrowthX provides a draft and a skeleton, and then you're going to fill in the blanks with the code snippet.
So how do you plan to work together on that?
So the two paths I was thinking of, A is exactly what you described.
They provide the first draft, which is a skeleton, and you could throw it in.
Or they provide a generic, top-level overview of all the things to consider and think about it.
And that could be an SEO-friendly blog post that they published.
And then based on that, we create an in-depth guide covering those topics.

Yeah, my recommendation is to just do one post as opposed to two to give it the maximum chances of getting, like, just being indexed, like, on SEO and GEO, but also, like, from a weekend also feel good about promoting.
promoting it through our channel, so that's my recommendation.
Okay.
Yeah, that makes sense.
You can do the first go, and we'll add the technical parts afterwards.
And as we discussed earlier, you're going to take the launchpad, right?
So Carrie, for context, the launchpad is our official demo app that we use across the board to showcase strategy with the Next.js frontend.
So you plan on using launchpad as an example, right?
Yeah, for all the, moving forward, I think our standards should be launchpad is the de facto code, like, library example for all the blockposts.
Okay, perfect.
Okay.
And so, like, think, like, Paul, like, tell me if it's too much, but, like, what I'm seeing is, like, a bunch of...
Yeah.
Okay.
Companies like the Medusa example I shared where they publish the skills on CloudCode, you can see the Medusa skills for following all the best practices.
Do you think we could do that for Strapi?
Why is that too much?
I mean, that would be cool to do.
I just don't know what in terms of the bandwidth, because I feel like it would have to fit the best practices from what, like, that are in line with our engineering team.
And so we'll have to create that doc with them.
Okay.
So maybe as a follow-up, like, not like in the, let's try to get the, you know, timing is important here.
So let's try to do like the V1, like what we just said, like the skeleton from GrowthX.
Launchpad code snippet from you.
And then, you know, as a V2, can, you know, if we see like good traction with that.
We can discuss how to, you know, publish our own skills and whatnot.
Yeah, that makes sense.
Okay, cool.
Heard.
I will get that to our content team.
I, and, yeah.
Yeah, I think we're good there.
Do you want me to go over performance real quick?
Or, it's all in here if you want to review it.
I'm happy to give you the time back if that's helpful.
It sounds like you guys are busy this week.
Yeah, mean, don't think there's too much value in, like, going over, like, what's written.
I mean, I've read it.
I don't have to read the questions.
yeah, I guess it's more of a question for you, Theo.
Like, is there anything we can help you with in terms of, like, the review or just want to make sure, like, you know, we're not the bottleneck and, like, we keep the velocity as much as possible.
So, see, if you need it.
If help, CEO, just feel free to raise your hand.
Yeah, the only blocker is getting the right image because this is a new year and our goal is to use a new block image.

And aside from that, I don't know how the workflow has been because I noticed the volume has not been consistent in the sense that, like, we used to have at least seven a week, but I think it was because of the season or so, but I guess it would start being consistent this, like, from this end of the month, so, yeah.
Okay, yeah.
I can check on that.
Yeah, that would be great.
That was my understanding is that it was the same volume, volume, but maybe it's because we've been kind of ramping up on integration and comparison pages, so maybe, like,
It's like the number of blog posts that slow down.
So, yeah, if you can be like that.

Yeah, sometimes when we add new content types that does affect volume, either temporarily or depending on the content type, it might affect it, you know, long term, just because of the amount of lift, you know, it's just like looking at like equivalent lift on different types of content.
So I'll follow up on that for you, just to make sure we're doing, we're fulfilling our, our end of the, of the agreement.
Great.
Perfect.
Go Do you have any update on like when we will be able to get access to Atlas or whatever?
I do not.
One of the things that our engineering team has been really focused on lately is something I was going to, I'm going to try to demo for, for y'all next week, is our own internal AI visibility tool.
So very similar to like a scrunch, at least on the surface, the difference for ours is going to be that you'll be able.
To see data right away, you're not going to have to wait for it to get populated or whatever with prompts.
And then it comes with its own category-level prompts that everyone can see, but then we've already put in the custom prompts that we were using in Scrunch for you as well.
And it's almost exclusively focused on evaluation stage content.
So it's that really high intent sort of queries that people are going to AI for.
So I'll be able to show you that next week.
We're still doing a few refinements on that, and then it would be something that you'll eventually have access to yourself.
I think Atlas has been delayed because of that, but certainly, you know, we're still refining that behind the scenes as well.
So that's where we are with that.
That sounds good.
Okay.
Yep.
All right.
Awesome.
It was great to talk with you, and next week Vivek will be with us.
Um, it'll be his last call, but, um, he's getting me up to speed on everything.
And, um.
And kind of filling me in on what the status of everything is.
So hopefully there will be a smooth transition.
That's my goal.
That's his goal, too.
That sounds great.
One thing that I just thought about, on the images, Theo, are you seeing the in-post images?
Like, is that up to our expectations in terms of, like, the quality of the visuals?
Because I know we went back and forth on that topic quite a few times.
I want to make sure that...
Yeah.
Yeah, so far, so good.
I definitely, if I find any, like, something that is maybe a typo or the brand or the...
Maybe it's not clear enough or as informative as it should be, I'll definitely make a call-out.
So...
Okay.
But so far, so good.
Okay, great.
Awesome.
Sounds good.
All right.
Thanks, team.
Thanks.
Talk to you next week.
All right.
Bye.
Thanks, everybody.
Bye.
Bye, everyone.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, resolve blockers, and align on new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Comparison Page Blocker:** The missing `CM` collection type is blocking the launch of comparison pages, which currently appear blank. GrowthX will deliver the next batch this week.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [**Integration Page Fix:** The form component is broken on many integration pages. This is a CMS fix (not a dev task) to standardize on a newsletter signup form.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**New Content Workflow:** A new technical blog post will use a two-step workflow: GrowthX provides the skeleton, and Paul adds technical details using the Launchpad demo app.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [**Tooling Update:** GrowthX's internal AI tool (a Scrunch alternative) is delayed, as engineering is focused on a new AI visibility tool that Carrie will demo next week.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Blockers

  - [**Comparison Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Problem:** Pages are blank because the required `CM` collection type is missing.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Status:** \~30 pages delivered; Theo awaits the next batch and the `CM` entries.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Resolution:** GrowthX will deliver the next batch and `CM` entries this week.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Integration Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Problem:** The form component is broken or missing on many pages.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**Solution:** Standardize on a single "Subscribe to Newsletter" form.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [**Action:** This is a CMS content fix, not a dev task. Theo will provide a working example to GrowthX for replication.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Blog Posts:**](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Theo is awaiting new blog images to meet the new year's visual standards.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [**Volume:** Production volume has dropped from 7 posts/week. Carrie will investigate if this is a temporary effect of prioritizing new content types.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [**Quality:** In-post images are meeting expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

### New Content Initiative: CMS Best Practices

  - [**Goal:** Create a technical blog post on CMS best practices, inspired by Vercel's "Next.js Bucks" guide.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [**Rationale:** A single, comprehensive post will maximize SEO and promotion impact.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
    1.  [**GrowthX:** Delivers the initial skeleton draft.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
    2.  [**Paul:** Adds all technical details and code snippets.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Standard:** All future blog posts will use the Launchpad demo app for code examples.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**Future Idea (V2):** Publish Strapi "skills" on CloudCode (like Medusa). This is deferred to V2 due to bandwidth and the need for engineering alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### Tooling & Transition

  - [**Tooling:**](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
      - [**Atlas:** Delayed.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
      - [**New AI Tool:** GrowthX is building an internal AI visibility tool (a Scrunch alternative) focused on high-intent evaluation-stage queries. It offers instant data and custom prompts. Carrie will demo it next week.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [**Transition:** Carrie is taking over from Vivek. Vivek will join next week's call for a final handover.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [Deliver the next batch of comparison pages and `CM` entries this week.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Investigate the drop in blog post production volume.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [Demo the new AI visibility tool next week.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [**Theo:**](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with a working example of the newsletter form component for integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [**Paul:**](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [Add technical details and Launchpad code snippets to the CMS best practices draft once received.](https://fathom.video/share/J2yKVJyewG3PGeyd1gdkNfUcgCqy7Gco?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

action_items.description: Review Airtable tabs; request additions from Carrie if needed
Send LLM topics chat thread to Carrie
Check for and publish new blog posts/integration pages from GrowthX
Share working newsletter form config + screenshots w/ Carrie; then Carrie ensures new integrations use it
Send 'Ride the Wave' skeleton to Paul; then Paul adds Launchpad code
Check blog post volume; report to Victor
Demo AI visibility tool next sync (Tue 9:30 PT)
